events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00159 (Infinite Aged Care (Cornubia) Pty Ltd). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.
